619 MIDLINE_ADMSN_CD MIDLINE_ADMSN_CD Other: IV Access - Midline (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient had midline IV access. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
